'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/UKThreatLevel\/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=8Xn829Ydnvwk7zM67ldMlb2Uwpfl9Vi8wYC78wDVF.c-1773639096-1.0.1.1-Bl3SJjlZRNyMkkJZGpYWXGCzQkI9MuEkxIw9v38wt8o"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
